meaning: Two special letters (Ta Ha) that begin this surah
upon you (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)
the Quran (object of أَنزَلْنَا - We sent down)
a gradual sending down (as the object being acted upon)
the earth (object of خَلَقَ - He created)
the highest (describing السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens' mentioned before)
The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)
to/for him (possesses مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - what is in the heavens)
of the heavens (possessed by/in/belonging to something)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
you speak loudly/openly (with بِٱلْقَوْلِ - in speech)
with/by the speech (object of تَجْهَرْ - speak openly)
then indeed he (subject of يَعْلَمُ - knows)
he knows (the subject of this verb is Allah, who knows السِّرَّ - the secret)
the secret (object of يَعْلَمُ - what Allah knows)
and did? (asking أَتَىٰكَ - did it come to you?)
has come to you (object of هَلْ)
then he said (connecting to رَءَا/he saw before it)
to his family (who he spoke to in قَالَ)
all of you stay! (command to group)
indeed I (speaking to أَهْلِهِ - his family)
surely perhaps I (will bring you from it)
I will bring to you all (addressing Musa's family)
from it (referring to نَارًا - the fire)
with a flame (referring to an unspecified amount from the fire)
or (connecting two possibilities: bringing an ember OR finding guidance)
I find (referring to finding guidance at the fire)
upon (connects النَّارِ 'the fire' to أَجِدُ 'I find')
he came to it/her (referring to the fire mentioned earlier)
he was called (before يٰمُوسَىٰٓ - O Moses)
your Lord (subject of إِنِّي أَنَا - Indeed, I am)
so take off! (command to Moses to remove his shoes)
in the valley (location where Allah is speaking to Moses)
Tuwa (name of sacred valley mentioned in the Quran)
I (the speaker in لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠)
any deity (object of لا/there is no)
the Hour (as the object of إِنَّ)
I am about to (connected to أُخْفِيهَا - I hide it)
I hide it (referring to الساعة/the Hour)
so that she/it is given what is due (referring to كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ - every soul)
he definitely prevents/blocks you (object of فَلَا)
and thus you fall/perish (consequence of يَصُدَّنَّكَ - preventing you)
and what (asking about تِلْكَ - that thing)
that (feminine demonstrative pronoun pointing to something far)
in/with your right hand (answering وَمَا تِلْكَ - and what is that?)
my staff (object that Musa uses to lean on)
upon it/her (referring to عَصَاىَ - my staff)
with it/her (referring to عَصَاىَ - my staff)
needs and purposes (as the main subject)
throw it! (command to Moses about his staff)
and then he threw it (referring to his staff)
and suddenly/and then (introduces the staff becoming a snake)
take it! (command to one person to take the staff)
its/her way (object of سَنُعِيدُ/we will return)
it will emerge (from يَدَكَ - your hand)
white (feminine, in this sentence describing يَدَكَ - your hand)
from (connecting غَيْرِ to what came before)
our signs (object of لِنُرِيَكَ/We will show you)
O my Lord! (calling upon the Lord)
and make (it) very easy! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ regarding أَمْرِى)
for me (connected to أَمْرِى - my matter)
my matter/affair (object of يَسِّرْ - make easy)
and untie! (command to untie the knot from لِّسَانِى my tongue)
a knot (that Moses wants untied from his tongue)
my speech (object of يَفْقَهُوا - they understand)
and make!/and appoint! (for لِّى - for me)
with/by him/it (referring to أَزْرِى - my strength)
and make him a partner! (in أَمْرِى my matter)
my matter/affair (object of أَشْرِكْهُ - include him in)
so that (introduces نُسَبِّحَكَ - we glorify You)
we glorify you intensely (acted on by كَىْ)
abundantly (describing how نُسَبِّحَ/we glorify is done)
much (describing how we remember/mention in وَنَذْكُرَكَ)
one who sees deeply/thoroughly (as a description of كُنتَ - you were)
certainly (emphasizing أُوتِيتَ - you have been given)
you were given (what يٰمُوسَىٰ asked for)
your request (that was given to you)
and indeed definitely (connects to مَنَنَّا - We bestowed favor)
a time, an instance (of أُخْرَىٰٓ - another)
throw him! (to a female) (into التَّابُوتِ - the chest)
the sea (subject of يَأْخُذْهُ/will take him)
he takes/will take him (object of فَلْيُلْقِهِ)
to/for me (emphasizing the connection to عَدُوٌّ)
and so that you may be created (under My supervision - عَلَىٰ عَيْنِىٓ)
and then you say/speak (to your sister)
do/does (asking أُخْتُكَ if she can guide)
I guide you all (to مَن يَكْفُلُهُۥ)
upon (connecting أُخْتُكَ 'your sister' to what follows)
who/whoever (introduces the person who يَكْفُلُهُۥ - would take care of him)
he cares for him (referring to baby Moses)
so We returned you (to your mother)
she settles/becomes content (so that عَيْنُهَا her eye)
that you become sad (connected to كَىْ meaning 'so that')
so we saved you (connected to previous events)
the distress (that you were saved from)
and we tested you through many trials (connected to فَرَجَعْنٰكَ - 'we returned you')
with much testing (describing how Allah tested Moses)
Madyan (name of an ancient city where Prophet Musa stayed)
then (connecting what happened after وَفَتَنَّاكَ فُتُونًا فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِىٓ أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ)
And I specially chose you (for لِنَفْسِى myself)
you (when talking to one male) (subject of اذْهَبْ - go)
with my signs (used with ٱذْهَبْ - go forth)
you both weaken (addressing Moses and Aaron)
Pharaoh (as the object of اذْهَبَا إِلَى - go to)
he transgressed (subject of إِنَّهُۥ - indeed he)
and say! / so say! (command to two people)
to/for him (connected to فَقُولَا - and say you two)
very gently/softly (as the manner of speaking)
they both said (to رَبَّنَا - our Lord)
Oh our Lord! (calling out to Him)
indeed we (subject of نَخَافُ - we fear)
we fear (of أَن يَفْرُطَ - that he will exceed)
that (connects to يَفْرُطَ - he will exceed)
upon us (connected to نَخَافُ - we fear)
that (connects to يَفْرُطَ - he will exceed)
indeed I (speaking to مَعَكُمَآ - with you two)
with you two (addressed in قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ - He said: Do not fear)
I hear/listen (present tense, in this ayah showing Allah speaking)
and I see (connected to أَسْمَعُ - I hear)
so you two go to him! (command to Moses and Aaron about Pharaoh)
Israel (the prophet Jacob, as the object of بَنِى/children of)
you punish them intensively (in context of فَقُولَآ - 'and you both say')
indeed/certainly (emphasizing جِئْنٰكَ - we have come to you)
with a sign/miracle (from رَبِّكَ - your Lord)
and the peace/safety (greeting in response to following guidance)
it was revealed (subject of قَدْ in إِنَّا قَدْ)
that (introduces what was revealed in أُوحِىَ)
he denied repeatedly/strongly (the warning of punishment mentioned in أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ)
so who (asking about the subject of يٰمُوسَىٰ)
your (both of you) lord (addressing Moses and Aaron)
our Lord (subject of قَالَ - he said)
its creation (what was given to everything)
the first ones (referring to ٱلْقُرُونِ - the previous generations)
its knowledge (subject of قَالَ - he said)
my Lord (subject of لَّا يَضِلُّ - 'does not err')
and not (connected to يَضِلُّ - he loses track)
he made/set (subject of الَّذِى - the One who)
for you all (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
a cradle, spread-out place (as object of جَعَلَ)
and he made paths (for لَكُمْ - for you)
in it (feminine, referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
paths/ways (object of سَلَكَ - made for you)
water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
and so we brought out (after sending down water)
and graze/feed! (command to group) (connected to كُلُوا۟)
for those who possess (connected to ءَايٰتٍ/signs)
We created you all (referring to all humans)
and in it/her (the earth where نُعِيدُكُمْ/we will return you)
and from it (referring to الأَرْضِ 'the earth')
we bring you all out (from the earth, as mentioned in مِنْهَا)
all of them (referring to Our signs)
and so he denied (after أَرَيْنٰهُ ءَايٰتِنَا - We showed him Our signs)
did you come to us? (subject of قَالَ)
so that you make us leave (from أَرْضِنَا - our land)
so most surely we will come to you
with a magic (object of فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ - we will surely bring to you)
like it/similar to it (referring to سِحْر/magic)
not at all (negates نُخْلِفُهُ - we break it)
we will break it (the مَوْعِدًا - appointment)
we (as the subject of نُخْلِفُهُ - we break it)
a place (that we should make neutral between us)
morning time (when Moses agreed to meet)
and then he turned himself away
Pharaoh (as the subject who turned away in فَتَوَلَّىٰ)
he came (after فَجَمَعَ - then he gathered)
to/for them (who Musa is speaking to)
woe to you! (warning to the people Musa is addressing)
a lie (object of تَفْتَرُوا - to fabricate)
and he will destroy you all completely
he invented falsely (subject of خَابَ - failed/lost)
between them (referring to the magicians who are discussing their plan)
and they concealed (النَّجْوَىٰ - their private conversation)
indeed (emphasizing what follows in هٰذٰنِ لَسٰحِرٰنِ)
these two (subject of لَسٰحِرٰنِ - indeed magicians)
they both want (referring to هٰذٰنِ/these two)
that (connects to يُخْرِجَاكُم - they expel you)
those two make you all exit
your (all of you) land (that Pharaoh's people are speaking about to each other)
your (plural) plot/scheme (object of فَأَجْمِعُوا - so gather)
then (after فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ/so gather your plan)
in a row/line (describing how they should come)
that we be (after أَن in أَن نَّكُونَ)
first (in the sequence of مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ - who threw)
who (asking about the person who will throw first)
all of you throw! (command to a group)
and then/and suddenly (introduces what happened after أَلْقُوا - they threw)
from (connects سِحْرِهِمْ to what came before)
their magic (referring to the magicians' tricks that made their ropes appear to move)
a state of fear (object of أَوْجَسَ/felt)
that which (object of تَلْقَفْ - it will swallow)
what/that which (refers to what is in يَمِينِكَ)
and so they were thrown down (subject: السَّحَرَةُ - the magicians)
the magicians (subject of أُلْقِىَ - were thrown)
we believed (said by the magicians to Pharaoh)
surely (he is) your leader (addressing Pharaoh's magicians)
the one who/which (refers to the one who taught you magic)
the magic (object of عَلَّمَكُمُ - taught you)
so I will most certainly cut off
And surely I will crucify you (pl)
of the date palms (possessed by جُذُوع - trunks)
which of us (subject of أَشَدُّ - more severe)
upon/over (something that will be mentioned after)
and the one who (connected to قَالُوا۟)
created us (object of الَّذِي - The One Who)
a judge (subject of فَٱقْضِ - so judge/decree)
this (when pointing to something feminine near)
indeed we/truly we (subject of ءَامَنَّا - we believed)
by our Lord (we swear by in إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا)
so that he may forgive (purpose of ءَامَنَّا - we believed)
upon him (referring to what they were forced to do)
indeed he (refers back to مَن/whoever in the ayah)
he comes (after إِنَّهُۥ مَن - indeed whoever)
a criminal (object of يَأْتِ - comes to)
Hell (as the object of يَأْتِ - comes to)
he lives/is alive (in contrast to لَا يَمُوتُ - does not die)
he comes to him (predicate of مَن)
a believer (as someone who comes to Allah in the ayah)
he did/worked (subject of يَأْتِهِ - comes to Him)
so those (connecting to what was mentioned before)
for them (referring to those who come as believers having done righteous deeds)
it flows (referring to الْأَنْهٰرُ - the rivers)
from (showing that the rivers flow from beneath the gardens)
the rivers (which flow under the gardens)
ones who are staying forever (describes the people in جَنَّاتُ)
reward (as the main subject of the sentence)
that (connects to أَسْرِ - travel by night)
travel at night! (command to Prophet Moses)
with my servants (object of أَسْرِ - travel by night)
being caught up with (object of لَّا تَخٰفُ - you do not fear)
and not (connected to تَخٰفُ - you fear)
and then he made them follow (فرعون made his army follow)
and then it covered/overwhelmed them (referring to the sea covering Pharaoh's army)
he covered/overwhelmed them (referring to Pharaoh's forces being overwhelmed by the sea)
his people (being led astray by فِرْعَوْنُ)
Israel (being addressed in يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ - O Children of Israel)
and we made a mutual promise to you all
one who goes to the side
of the mountain (possessed by جَانِبَ - side)
the right-sided (describing جَانِبَ 'side' in this ayah)
the manna (the special food Allah gave as a gift)
eat! (command to group) (followed by مِن طَيِّبٰتِ - from the good things)
from (connecting كُلُوا۟ eat to طَيِّبٰتِ good things)
good things, pure things (object of كُلُوا)
what (connects رَزَقْنٰكُمْ to what comes before)
we provided you all (command object of كُلُوا - eat)
and so he descends (consequence of تَطْغَوْا۟)
then indeed/so certainly (connects to يَحِلَّ - descends)
and indeed I (am the one who لَغَفَّارٌ/repeatedly forgives)
truly one who constantly covers up faults (describing اللَّهِ)
he returned back (from wrong to right)
and he believed (connected to تَابَ - repented)
and he worked (connected to تَابَ and ءَامَنَ)
they/them (referring to the people who went astray in this ayah)
those (pointing to people or things) (subject of عَلَىٰٓ)
and I rushed/hurried eagerly (speaking to رَبِّ)
to you (male) (subject of عَجِلْتُ - I hastened)
so that you become pleased (purpose of عَجِلْتُ/I rushed)
so indeed we (speaking to قَوْمَكَ - your people)
and he led them astray (referring to قَوْمَكَ - your people)
so he returned (subject of قَالَ - he said)
O my people! (Moses speaking to his people)
did not (questioning يَعِدْكُمْ - he promised you)
he promises you all (in response to قَالَ - he said)
your Lord (addressing the Children of Israel)
a promise (object of يَعِدْ - he promised)
has it become long? (questioning the long wait)
we broke (subject of قَالُوا - they said)
your appointment (object of أَخْلَفْنَا/we failed to keep)
by/with our power (explaining how they did something)
burdens (object of حُمِّلْنَا - we were made to bear)
and so/thus like that (connected to فَقَذَفْنٰهَا)
then he brought out (عِجْلًا - a calf)
to/for them (referring to the people who made the calf)
a calf (object of أَخْرَجَ - he brought out)
a body (object of أَخْرَجَ - he brought out)
a mooing sound (of the golden calf عِجْلًا)
and so they said (following the previous action in the ayah)
your god (referring to the golden calf they made)
Then do they not...? (introduces a rhetorical question)
that not (shows something won't happen in يَرْجِعُ)
to them (returns to them in يَرْجِعُ)
and not (connects to previous negation أَلَّا)
O my people! (calling out to them)
and indeed (connects to فُتِنتُم - you were tested)
so all of you follow me! (plural command)
and obey! (all of you) (command related to أَمْرِى - my command)
we will leave/move away (emphatically negated by لَن)
to us (referring to the people speaking to Moses)
O Aaron! (being called, as the subject of مَا مَنَعَكَ)
he prevented you (object of رَأَيْتَ - you saw)
when (connecting to رَأَيْتَهُمْ - you saw them)
you follow me carefully (connected to أَلَّا meaning 'that not')
did you then disobey? (questioning أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِ)
indeed I (connected to خَشِيتُ - I feared)
I became afraid (of أَن تَقُولَ - that you would say)
between (acted on by فَرَّقْتَ - you divided)
so what (asking about خَطْبُكَ - your matter)
your matter/affair (being asked about by مَا/what)
I became perceptive/insightful (about مَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ - what they did not perceive)
with what (referring to what they did not see)
they see/perceive (in لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ - they did not see)
so I grasped (in response to بَصُرْتُ - I saw)
and like that (connected to فَنَبَذْتُهَا - so I threw it)
so indeed (connects to قَالَ فَٱذْهَبْ - he said, 'Go!')
that (introduces what will be said in تَقُولَ)
an appointed time/place (object of لَكَ - for you)
you will fail to fulfill it (object of لَّن)
who/which/that (referring to your god that you remained devoted to)
upon him/on it (connected to إِلٰهِكَ - your god)
surely we will definitely burn it intensely
we will most certainly scatter it
a complete scattering (object of لَنَنسِفَنَّهُ - we will surely scatter it)
your (all of you) god (subject of this sentence)
except (excludes هُوَ from what came before)
he encompassed (subject of the relative clause after الَّذِي)
knowledge (as the object being encompassed by وَسِعَ)
like that, in this way (referring to what was mentioned before)
upon you (object of نَقُصُّ - we narrate)
of the news (multiple pieces) (part of مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ - from the news of)
he turned away (from عَنْهُ - from it)
away from him (acted on by أَعْرَضَ - turned away)
so/then indeed he (subject of يَحْمِلُ - carries)
a burden (object of يَحْمِلُ - he carries)
those who stay permanently (describing their state in فِيهِ - in it)
in it (referring to remaining/staying mentioned in خٰلِدِينَ)
and it became bad (describing حِمْلًا - their burden)
day (object of سَآءَ - it was bad)
the resurrection (possessed by/connected to يَوْمَ - Day)
a burden (as something being carried on the Day of Judgment)
on the day (when يُنفَخُ - it is blown)
it is blown (into الصُّورِ - the horn)
the horn (that is blown into يُنفَخُ فِى)
and we gather (subject gathering ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ - the criminals)
on that day (when يُنفَخُ - is blown)
blue-eyed ones (object of وَنَحْشُرُ/we will gather)
between them (whispering to each other in يَتَخٰفَتُونَ)
if (introducing a condition in this ayah)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
and they ask you (about الْجِبَالِ - the mountains)
then say! (responding to وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ - and they ask you)
and then he leaves/abandons it (referring to the earth)
a flat ground (object of فَيَذَرُهَا - so He will leave it)
completely leveled and smooth (describing how Allah will leave the earth in this ayah)
in it (referring to the earth/ground mentioned earlier)
any crookedness (object of تَرَىٰ - you will see)
they follow intensely/closely (subject of لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ)
for him, to him (referring to الدَّاعِىَ - the caller)
and it/she became humble and still (describes الْأَصْوَاتُ - the voices)
the voices (subject of خَشَعَتِ - became humble)
so not (connects to تَسْمَعُ - you hear)
a soft sound/whisper (as the thing being heard)
except (introduces the exception to لَّا تَنفَعُ 'will not benefit')
for him/to him (referring to permission from الرَّحْمٰنُ)
for him/to him (referring to مَنْ who is permitted)
he knows (subject of مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ)
that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
their hands (what is in front of them)
behind them (what is after يَعْلَمُ مَا)
the faces (as the doer of humbling)
to The Ever-Living One (connected to خَابَ/failed)
wrongdoing (as the object being carried in حَمَلَ)
and not (connected to فَلَا يَخَافُ - then he will not fear)
any unfair decrease (of what is due to them)
and like that (connects to أَنزَلْنٰهُ - We sent it down)
we sent it down (referring to قُرْءَانًا)
a Quran/recitation (as the object being sent down in أَنزَلْنٰهُ)
perhaps they (expressing hope that they will يَتَّقُونَ)
a remembrance (object of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - We sent it down)
So He rose up/exalted Himself (subject of ٱللَّهُ)
with/by the Quran (connected to تَعْجَلْ - do not hasten)
before (of أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ - it being completed)
my Lord! (addressing Allah directly with emphasis)
increase for me! (command to increase knowledge for me)
and so he forgot (after عَهِدْنَآ - We took a covenant)
determination (object of نَجِدْ - we did not find)
to the angels (who were commanded اسْجُدُوا۟)
to Adam (showing who they should prostrate to)
Iblis (as the subject being excepted from سَجَدُوٓا۟)
then we said (introducing what was said to آدَمُ)
O Adam (being addressed by فَقُلْنَا - so We said)
indeed/certainly (introduces what Allah said about عَدُوٌّ)
he will surely expel you both
and thus you will struggle/suffer (consequence of being expelled from Paradise)
indeed/verily (strongly emphasizes لَكَ 'for you' that follows)
for you (speaking to one male) (connected to تَجُوعَ - you will be hungry)
that not (introduces something that won't happen to تَجُوعَ)
that you become hungry (connected to أَلَّا meaning 'that not')
and not (connects to تَجُوعَ - you will hunger)
and indeed you (subject of لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟)
you all become thirsty (in relation to لَا before it meaning 'not')
you suffer from sun exposure (in relation to لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ - you will not thirst)
and then he whispered secretly (subject of قَالَ)
do you want to know if (introducing أَدُلُّكَ - shall I guide you)
and a kingdom (offered to آدَمُ by الشَّيْطٰنُ)
and then they both ate (referring to Adam and his wife)
and then it (feminine) became apparent (subject of سَوْءٰتُهُمَا)
their (dual) private parts (referring to Adam and Eve)
they both patch/cover (referring to Adam and Eve)
Adam (as the subject of عَصَىٰ - disobeyed)
He chose him specially (subject of رَبُّهُۥ)
so he turned back in repentance (after اجْتَبٰهُ - He chose him)
upon him, towards him (referring to آدَمَ/Adam)
you two go down! (command for two people)
all together (describing how they should go down)
he loses/is losing the right way (subject of فَلَا)
and whoever (subject of أَعْرَضَ - turned away)
he deliberately turned away (from ذِكْرِى - My remembrance)
my remembrance (object of أَعْرَضَ عَن - turned away from)
then indeed (connects to وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ - and whoever turns away)
a way of life (as the object of لَهُ - he has)
and we gather him (connected to أَعْرَضَ - turned away)
day (object of وَنَحْشُرُهُۥ - we will gather him)
the resurrection (specifically the Day of Judgment, being described in this ayah)
blind (in relation to يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Judgment)
O my Lord! (being called out to)
why (asking about the reason he was raised blind)
and indeed (while كُنتُ بَصِيرًا - I was seeing)
seeing/understanding clearly (as a state of كُنتُ)
like that (referring to how the person ignored Allah's signs)
she came to you (referring to the signs/verses mentioned in ءَايٰتُنَا)
so you forgot/neglected it (referring to Allah's signs)
we repay (those who أَسْرَفَ - exceeded limits)
he believes (in آيٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ - signs of his Lord)
and surely the punishment (subject of أَشَدُّ)
he guides (in a conditional or command context)
for them (referring to the previous generations mentioned in كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا)
how many (referring to أَهْلَكْنَا - we destroyed)
before them (referring to the previous nations mentioned in كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا - how many We destroyed)
in (connects مَسٰكِنِهِمْ 'their dwellings' to يَمْشُونَ 'they walk')
that (pointing to something far) (refers to the previous statement about destroyed nations)
for those who possess (connected to ءَايٰتٍ)
and if not for (connects to previous statement)
from (connects رَبِّكَ to what came before)
as a binding necessity (predicate of كَانَ)
so be patient! (in response to what they say)
and glorify! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
with praise (connected to رَبِّكَ - your Lord)
of the day (part of أَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ - ends of the day)
perhaps you (will be satisfied with تَرْضَىٰ)
you will be pleased (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
you must definitely not extend (negative command with لا)
your two eyes (object of تَمُدَّنَّ - do not extend)
what/that which (connects to مَتَّعْنَا - we provided)
with it/him (referring to what was given to others)
pairs/spouses (as object of مَتَّعْنَا - we provided)
from them (referring to the worldly pleasures mentioned in the ayah)
so that we may test them (referring to those who are attracted to worldly pleasures mentioned in the ayah)
in it (referring to what We have provided as enjoyment)
your family (object of وَأْمُرْ - and command)
with/by the prayer (object of وَأْمُرْ - and command)
and endure! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
upon it/her (referring to الصَّلَوٰةِ - the prayer)
provision (object of نَسْـَٔلُكَ - we ask you for)
with a sign (object of يَأْتِينَا - he comes to us)
from (connects رَّبِّهِ to what came before)
that which (is written) (connects to فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ - in the scriptures)
and even if/although (connects this hypothetical situation to what came before)
they would surely say (in response to أَهْلَكْنٰهُم - if We had destroyed them)
our Lord (being addressed in قَالُوا they said)
if not, why not (expressing wish) (connected to أَرْسَلْتَ - you sent)
a messenger (object of أَرْسَلْتَ - you sent)
one who waits and watches intensively (subject of قُلْ)
so all of you wait watchfully (command to multiple people)
who (asking about the people who are أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ)
of the path (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - people/companions)
the very straight/proper one (referring to the path mentioned before)
